# get_sites { #socialinfrascorepy.get_sites }

```python
get_sites(client, location_id, limit=1000)
```

Get social-infrastructure sites for a location.

Returns a capped random sample of sites within the given location.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name        | Type     | Description                                                                                              | Default    |
|-------------|----------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|------------|
| client      | SIClient | A client from :func:`~socialinfrascorepy.client` authenticated with :func:`~socialinfrascorepy.sign_in`. | _required_ |
| location_id | str      | Location identifier from ``public.location.location_id``.                                                | _required_ |
| limit       | int      | Maximum rows to return (hard-capped at 1000).                                                            | `1000`     |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type             | Description   |
|--------|------------------|---------------|
|        | pandas.DataFrame | Site rows.    |

## Examples {.doc-section .doc-section-examples}

```python
>>> sites = si.get_sites(authed, location_id="42")
```
